samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_16bit">
    <description>Implement an unsigned 16-bit multiplier using shift and accumulate operations.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="start">Chip enable signal to initiate multiplication.</input>
        <input id="ain" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplicand input.</input>
        <input id="bin" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplier input.</input>
        <output id="yout" width_description="[31:0]">Product output.</output>
        <output id="done">Completion flag indicating the end of multiplication.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="i">Shift count register, 0 to 16.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <comment>Assume i is 17 in the following description.</comment>
        <assign>
            <lhs>i</lhs>
            <rhs>
                <if>
                    <true>
                        <and>
                            <equal>
                                <unary>rst_n</unary>
                                <const>0</const>
                            </equal>
                            <leq>
                                <unary>i</unary>
                                <const>16</const>
                            </leq>
                        </and>
                    </true>
                    <false>
                        <sub>
                            <unary>i</unary>
                            <const>1</const>
                        </sub>
                    </false>
                </if>
            </rhs>
        </assign>
        <assign>
            <lhs>done_r</lhs>
            <rhs>
                <if>
                    <true>
                        <equal>
                            <unary>i</unary>
                            <const>16</const>
                        </equal>
                    </true>
                    <false>
                        <const>0</const>
                    </false>
                </if>
            </rhs>
        </assign>
        <assign>
            <lhs>yout_r</lhs>
            <rhs>
                <if>
                    <true>
                        <equal>
                            <unary>i</unary>
                            <const>0</const>
                        </equal>
                    </true>
                    <false>
                        <concat>
                            <if>
                                <true>
                                    <and>
                                        <not>
                                            <unary>areg</unary>
                                        </not>
                                        <equal>
                                            <unary>i</unary>
                                            <const>16</const>
                                        </equal>
                                    </and>
                                </true>
                                <false>
                                    <const>0</const>
                                </false>
                            </if>
                            <concat>
                                <if>
                                    <true>
                                        <and>
                                            <bit_select>
                                                <unary>areg</unary>
                                                <bit_index>i</bit_index>
                                            </bit_select>
                                            <equal>
                                                <unary>i</unary>
                                                <const>16</const>
                                            </equal>
                                        </and>
                                    </true>
                                    <false>
                                        <const>0</const>
                                    </false>
                                </if>
                                <bit_select>
                                    <unary>breg</unary>
                                    <bit_index>i</bit_index>
                                </bit_select>
                            </concat>
                        </concat>
                    </false>
                </if>
            </rhs>
        </assign>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
    The module performs shift and accumulate operations to compute the product of the multiplicand (ain) and multiplier (bin). 
    On the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of reset, the shift count (i) is updated. 
    If reset is active, i is set to 0. If start is high and i is less than 17, i is incremented by 1. If start is low, i is reset to 0.
    The multiplication completion flag (done_r) is updated on the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of reset. 
    If reset is active, done_r is set to 0. If i is equal to 16, done_r is set to 1, indicating that the multiplication is complete. 
    If i is equal to 17, done_r is reset to 0.
    The shift and accumulate operation is performed on the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of reset. 
    If reset is active, the multiplicand register (areg), multiplier register (breg), and product register (yout_r) are reset to 0. 
    If start is high, the multiplicand and multiplier are loaded into areg and breg, respectively. 
    If i is greater than 0 and less than 17, the product is accumulated by shifting the multiplier by i-1 bits and appending 0 bits to the least significant position if the bit at position i-1 in areg is high.
    </implementation>
</module>
